---
title: "Falcon budgeting app roadmap"
type: project
---

# Falcon budgeting app roadmap

Next up for the Falcon budgeting app, after recurring-transaction detection
ships, is CSV export of categorized transactions so users can hand their
accountant a clean spreadsheet at tax time. After CSV export, the roadmap
turns to a small companion mobile app for quick on-the-go expense capture,
which would sync back into Falcon's local SQLite store over the same LAN.
